steps.title: Complete the subject
steps.content: The opening noun phrase names the hypothesized protolanguage from which Kartvelian languages descended. After the comma, the sentence needs an appositive that names that language and then a main verb to complete the sentence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched appositives
steps.content: Choice A makes linguistic properties the subject. Choice C makes descendants' properties the subject. Choice D makes experts the subject. None renames the protolanguage after the comma or supplies the needed predicate for that subject. The version that names Proto-Kartvelian and then uses has been reconstructed is grammatical. The answer is B.
